prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image features a man wearing a yellow shirt with a brown tie standing next to a window. He appears to be looking downward or possibly staring at something outside the frame. His attire suggests that he might be dressed up for an event or formal occasion. In addition to his outfit, there is another person partially visible on the right side of the image.

The room has two chairs placed near each other, one closer to the left edge of the picture and the other towards the center-right area. There are also three ties in the scene; one tied around the neck of the man in the yellow shirt, another hanging from the chair's back, and the third one located further away from the main subjects.
